content:
============================================================
CLIENT PROFILE COMPARISON REPORT / 客户画像对比报告
============================================================
Report Date / 报告日期: 2026-05-30T18:47:02.310204

------------------------------------------------------------
RISK PROFILE COMPARISON / 风险画像对比
------------------------------------------------------------
Client               Score      Level               
--------------------------------------------------
Young Conservative   2.0        Conservative        
Middle Aggressive    4.5        Aggressive          
Retiree              2.5        Conservative        

------------------------------------------------------------
FINANCIAL COMPARISON / 财务对比
------------------------------------------------------------
Client               Net Worth       Savings Rate   
--------------------------------------------------
Young Conservative   $      80,000        37.5%
Middle Aggressive    $   1,200,000        52.0%
Retiree              $   1,200,000        25.0%

------------------------------------------------------------
BEHAVIORAL BIASES / 行为偏差
------------------------------------------------------------
Young Conservative   2 biases detected
Middle Aggressive    1 biases detected
Retiree              0 biases detected

------------------------------------------------------------
KEY INSIGHTS / 关键洞察
------------------------------------------------------------
1. Risk tolerance varies significantly: Middle Aggressive (4.5) vs Young Conservative (2.0). / 风险容忍度差异显著：Middle Aggressive (4.5) vs Young Conservative (2.0)。
2. Net worth range: Middle Aggressive has 15.0x the net worth of Young Conservative. / 净资产范围：Middle Aggressive 是 Young Conservative 的 15.0 倍。
3. Client(s) with most behavioral biases (Young Conservative: 2 biases) may benefit from enhanced behavioral coaching. / 行为偏差最多的客户 (Young Conservative: 2 个偏差) 可能需要更多的行为金融指导。
